items.example: She asked her boss for some time off work.
He's an employee of a large company.
Dave is my classmate. We're both in Year 12.
My business partner and I started the company together.
Leticia is my team-mate. We play in the same basketball team.
I'm a member of a swimming club.
My father asked his best friend to be my godfather.
My mentor helped me develop my career.
This is Marianna, my fiancée. We're getting married next year.
